tasks.description: Fix cascade rejection in orchestrator quality gate
tasks.context: In backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts, modify validateTaskQuality to prevent cascade rejections. When a task fails quality checks, mark ONLY that task as rejected, not all subsequent tasks. Change rejection logic to be task-specific, not iteration-breaking.

In backend/src/services/task-complexity-validator.ts, add validation rules: reject tasks >3 files, >800 chars context, vague deliverables, or missing file paths. Return specific rejection reasons. Integrate into orchestrator before MiniMax dispatch.

In backend/src/services/quality-gate-config.ts, implement retry mechanism for quality gate failures. Allow 2 retries with exponential backoff. Log each attempt. Prevents transient failures from blocking pipeline.

In backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts, add detailed logging for quality gate decisions. Log: task ID, rejection reason, validation scores, retry attempts. Use structured logging format. Critical for debugging future issues.

Create backend/src/services/orchestrator.test.ts with tests for: cascade rejection prevention, complexity validation, retry logic, quality gate scoring. Use real task payloads from failed sprints as test cases.
